forms.name: staff-application
forms.title: Staff application
forms.description: Starter application form for moderation, helper, or community roles.

questions.label: What relevant experience do you have?
questions.placeholder: Tell us about moderation, support, community, or project experience.

questions.label: When are you usually active?
questions.placeholder: Times of day and days of week.

questions.label: What would you be good at in this role?
questions.placeholder: Moderation, conflict resolution, support, moderation tooling, etc.
